title: DoktorOnNet - Swedish Telemedicine Platform
problem: Patients need quick access to medical advice but traditional care settings have long wait times.
solution: Online doctor consultation platform offering video visits, prescriptions, and medical advice for common conditions.
varden_fit: Moderate — competes with some Varden clinic partners for telemedicine visits.
notes: Swedish telemedicine. Competitor to Kry/Livi in some segments.
